Refund Policy

Important information about refunds for digital products.

1. General Policy

All products sold by Armora Cheats are digital, time‑limited or lifetime licenses. Because access is granted immediately and cannot be “returned”, all sales are generally considered final.

2. Non‑Refundable Situations

We typically do NOT offer refunds in the following cases:

  • Once a license key has been delivered or activated.
  • If your account or hardware ID is banned, restricted, or flagged by a game, anti‑cheat, or third party.
  • For performance issues related to your own PC or internet.
  • For misuse, violations of our Terms of Service, or attempts to share / resell access.

3. Exceptional Cases

In rare situations (for example, duplicate purchases or clear payment errors), we may consider partial or full refunds at our sole discretion. Proof of purchase and identity may be required.

4. Third‑Party Resellers

If you purchased access from an authorized reseller, their refund rules may apply in addition to ours. You may need to contact the reseller directly regarding payment disputes.

5. Chargebacks

Unauthorized chargebacks or payment disputes may result in immediate suspension of your license, account blacklisting, and refusal of future service.

6. Contact

If you believe you qualify for a refund under this Policy, please contact support with as much detail as possible (payment proof, date, and reason). We will review your request, but approval is not guaranteed.
